one_time_description: Minister of Crown-Indigenous Relations and Northern Affairs settlement of $155,000,000 - 1906 surrender of land specific claim settlement
economic_notes: Metlakatla Development Corporation and Metlakatla Stewardship Society referenced as related entities. $150,000,000 specific claim settlement distributed as $100,000 per registered member; balance retained in financial institution for members.
notes: Massive one-time $155M specific claim settlement from Crown-Indigenous Relations dominates financials. $96,951,453 in member distributions payable at year-end representing $100,000 per registered member. Cash jumped from $11.9M to $169M due to settlement. Strategic Initiatives expenditure of $101,956,455 likely reflects distribution-related costs. No long-term debt. No remuneration schedule included in documents provided. Segment disclosure referenced in Note 13 but table not fully visible.
